description: Staffing compliance thresholds and metric definitions for facility-quarter summaries. Extend state_thresholds for new states; wire MACPAC later without changing summary column names.

total_rn_hours.label: Total RN hours
total_rn_hours.numerator_description: Sum of reported RN, RN administrator, and director-of-nursing hours
total_rn_hours.methodology_text: Total reported RN hours (RN + RN administrator + DON), matching PBJ320 rn_total_8h day counts.
total_rn_hours.description: Total reported RN hours (RN + RN administrator + DON), matching PBJ320 rn_total_8h.

total_nurse_hprd.label: Total nurse HPRD
total_nurse_hprd.numerator_description: Sum of all reported nursing role hours (RN, LPN, CNA, aide trainee, medication aide, and nursing administrators including DON)
total_nurse_hprd.denominator_description: MDS census for that day (facility-days with census > 0 only)
total_nurse_hprd.methodology_text: PBJ320 Total_Nurse_HPRD: all reported nursing roles including admin/DON, divided by census.
total_nurse_hprd.description: PBJ320 Total_Nurse_HPRD (all reported nursing roles incl. admin/DON).

direct_care_hprd.label: Direct-care nurse HPRD
direct_care_hprd.numerator_description: Sum of reported RN, LPN, CNA, nurse aide trainee, and medication aide hours
direct_care_hprd.denominator_description: MDS census for that day (facility-days with census > 0 only)
direct_care_hprd.methodology_text: NY-mapped direct-care HPRD per N.Y. Public Health Law § 2895-b role mapping (excludes DON and nursing administrator).
direct_care_hprd.description: NY PHL § 2895-b mapped direct care HPRD (RN+LPN+CNA+NA trainee+MedAide; excludes DON and nursing admin).

state_thresholds.public_methodology_text: PBJ320 screens reported PBJ direct-care HPRD (RN, LPN, CNA, nurse aide trainee, medication aide; excludes DON and nursing admin) against N.Y. Public Health Law § 2895-b’s 3.50 HPRD total component. Role mapping is informative—not an enforcement determination.
state_thresholds.label: Days below NY 3.50 direct care HPRD
state_thresholds.notes: N.Y. Public Health Law § 2895-b sets a 3.50 HPRD minimum for mapped direct-care nursing (RN, LPN, CNA, nurse aide trainee, medication aide). PBJ320 screens reported PBJ daily hours using that role mapping (excludes DON and nursing administrator)—informative, not an enforcement determination. Source: https://www.nysenate.gov/legislation/laws/PBH/2895-B

state_thresholds.public_methodology_text: MACPAC state compendium: 3.06 HPRD total estimated staffing. CT Public Act (eff. Oct 2021, Sec. 10) directed DPH to set nursing home minimums often summarized as ~3.0 direct-care hours per resident per day. PBJ320 applies the 3.06 benchmark to total reported nursing HPRD (all PBJ nursing roles incl. admin/DON), not Nurse_Care_HPRD alone.
state_thresholds.label: Days below CT 3.06 total nursing HPRD
state_thresholds.notes: MACPAC state compendium: 3.06 HPRD total estimated staffing. CT Public Act (eff. Oct 2021, Sec. 10) directed DPH to set nursing home minimums often summarized as ~3.0 direct-care hours per resident per day. PBJ320 applies the 3.06 benchmark to total reported nursing HPRD (all PBJ nursing roles incl. admin/DON), not Nurse_Care_HPRD alone.
